message:
feat(runtime,store,command): wire repl-backlog-size and repl-timeout

- Add repl_backlog_size (1 MiB default) and repl_timeout_sec (60s default)
  to ServerState with CONFIG SET/GET support
- INFO replication repl_backlog_size reads from store.server_repl_backlog_size
  (synced from runtime on CONFIG SET) instead of hardcoded 1048576

Closes: frankenredis-5l2, frankenredis-436

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
